nodes.title: Western Plant Room
nodes.text:
The western plant room contains a boiler that is no longer running, the pilot light out.

The western plant room leads to the loading bay.

The western plant room without passing through any public space.

nodes.text:
The stairwell climbs the eastern tower from the ground floor to the roof.

The apartment tower lobby opens onto the pedestrian bridge at first floor level.

The stairwell climbs the eastern tower is accessible from the stairwell.

nodes.title: Motorway Overpass
nodes.text:
The motorway overpass carries six lanes above the district.

The motorway overpass is supported by concrete columns set at regular intervals through the district below.

The motorway overpass is constant and directional.

nodes.text:
The loading bay faces the service road from the live lanes.

The loading bay is sheltered by a canopy above the dock doors.

The loading bay faces the service road at the rear of the retail block.

nodes.title: Pedestrian Bridge
nodes.text:
The pedestrian bridge affords a view of the canal and the motorway overpass is low enough to touch from the top of the.

The pedestrian bridge is steel and glass, enclosed.

The pedestrian bridge crosses the canal between the retail block and the apartment towers.

nodes.title: Car Park
nodes.text:
The car park lighting runs on a motion sensor that activates when anything moves through the car park.

The car park occupies the basement and the first two levels below the plaza.

The car park smells of oil and concrete dust.

nodes.title: Transit Hall
nodes.text:
The transit hall connects the railway platform near the mouth of the tunnel: thin wire bound with electrical tape, taller than a person.

The transit hall ceiling is high, the walls tiled in a pattern that is not random.

The transit hall ceiling is high, the walls tiled in a pattern of overlapping rectangles.

nodes.title: Far End
nodes.text:
The central plaza opens between four office towers.

The canal towpath is tarmac, cracked, with bollards at intervals.

The maintenance tunnel runs beneath the arcade and the plaza.

nodes.title: Maintenance Tunnel
nodes.text:
The service tunnel runs parallel to the main service road at the rear of the retail block.

The maintenance tunnel is low, the ceiling crossed with pipes and cable trays.

The service tunnel floor is concrete with a shallow drainage channel running down the centre.

nodes.title: Railway Platform
nodes.text:
The railway platform sits below ground level, accessible by escalator from the transit hall.

The railway platform benches are fixed to the floor, the seats intact.

The railway platform is lit by strips of fluorescent light mounted low on the walls.
